message:
refactor: Apply DRY to more runtime.zig functions

- Refactor pyObjectToList: extract convertItemsToValue helper (62→31 lines)
- Refactor pyObjectToPyValue/pyObjectToValue: use cast helper (30→17 lines)
- Refactor decref: extract deallocByType + type-specific dealloc helpers (82→59 lines)
- Fix pickle import path (Lib/pickle.zig → Lib/pickle/pickle.zig)

runtime.zig: 1595 → 1517 lines (78 lines removed through DRY)
Total reduction from original: 2565 → 1517 lines (~41%)
